name: Vigo
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive funds internationally with competitive exchange rates and low fees.
description_long: Western Union is one of the world's largest money transfer companies, operating for over a century with a vast network of agent locations and digital channels. The company specializes in international remittances, allowing customers to send money from the United States to over 200 countries and territories worldwide. Their platform supports multiple currencies including MXN (Mexico), GTQ (Guatemala), PHP (Philippines), INR (India), COP (Colombia), and many others, making it accessible for immigrants and individuals with family abroad. Western Union distinguishes itself through its extensive physical footprint—partnering with retail locations, banks, and post offices—combined with online transfer capabilities that provide flexibility in how customers send funds. They offer competitive pricing with promotional incentives like $0 fees on first transfers for registered users and dynamic exchange rates that fluctuate based on market conditions. The company's strength lies in its reach and reliability; customers can pick up cash at millions of locations globally without requiring a bank account. However, Western Union's fees and exchange rates vary significantly by destination country and transfer method, and while they offer promotional rates, standard fees and markups on currency conversion can be substantial compared to modern fintech alternatives. For consumers sending money internationally, Western Union remains a trusted established option, though newer digital remittance services often provide more transparent and competitive pricing structures.
address: A&e Check Cashing, 3365 Buford Hwy NE Suite 995, Atlanta, GA 30329

company_info.headquarters: A&e Check Cashing, 3365 Buford Hwy NE Suite 995, Atlanta, GA 30329

pros: Global reach with money transfer to 200+ countries and territories
Promotional offers: $0 fee on first online international transfer for registered users
Competitive exchange rates with transparent rate disclosure (e.g., 1.00 USD = 16.9486-17.6326 MXN)
Multiple send methods including online transfers and agent locations
Support for diverse currencies across major remittance corridors (Mexico, Philippines, India, Colombia, Guatemala)
Flexible receiver options with ability to track exact amount recipient will receive
Established brand with decades of operational history and global infrastructure
cons: Exchange rate markups built into conversion rates, not a direct 1:1 market rate
Fees vary significantly by destination country and transfer amount (shown from $1.99-$0.00 but typically higher for non-promotional transfers)
Website indicates 'Orange wallet temporarily unavailable,' suggesting service disruptions
Limited transparency on standard fee structure without entering specific transfer details
Modern competitors like Wise, OFX, and others often offer more transparent all-in pricing
best_for: Immigrants sending money to family in Mexico, Philippines, Guatemala, India, or Colombia
Individuals without bank accounts needing accessible cash pickup locations worldwide
One-time or occasional international money senders who value established brand trust
Customers in areas with Western Union agent locations who prefer in-person transactions
diagnosis: Western Union is best for individuals sending international remittances to family or contacts in major destination countries, particularly those without banking relationships or in underserved areas lacking modern fintech options. The main caveat is that while their global reach and physical presence are unmatched, exchange rate markups and variable fees mean customers should compare rates with digital-first competitors before committing to larger transfers.
services: Online international money transfers with registration benefits
Multi-currency support across 200+ countries and territories
Real-time exchange rate quotes and fee calculators
Cash pickup at agent locations globally
Bank deposit transfers to recipient accounts
Mobile and web platform for sending funds
Promotional pricing (zero fees on first registered transfer)
Send amount customization with instant receiver payout calculation
Multiple destination country and currency pairs
Account registration for better exchange rates
